events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: this is a LOTO device-pairing violation — an energy-isolating point has only a lock or only a tag, not both. Under 1910.147(c)(5) both must be applied together (absent a documented tagout-only exception with added protections). Work must stop, the responsible authorized employee must correct the device pairing, and isolation must be re-verified (zero-energy try-out) before service continues. Decision: **fail**, risk **high**.
